MACRO REGIME — 2026-06-30
- Warsh Fed held 3.50-3.75%, refused forward guidance; PCE +3.4% y/y (5th yr >target). [axios 2026-06-26]
- DXY up (SCOTUS blocked Cook firing); yen 162, 40-yr low, intervention watch. [wsj 2026-06-30]
- Dow record >52,000, GOOG added; Mag7 shed $2.3tn, rotation into AI chipmakers. [wsj/ft 2026-06-29/30]
- DEBASEMENT TRADE UNWINDING: gold -12% MTD, BTC down, USD up. [wsj 2026-06-30]
- MicroStrategy abandons "never sell BTC", plans BTC sales to outlast crypto winter. [wsj 2026-06-30]
- COIN: India INR rails launched but ED raids off-ramps, USDT 8.5% premium (regulatory friction). [coindesk 2026-06-29]
- NEM directly in gold-selloff blast radius.
NARRATIVE: Hawkish-opacity Warsh Fed + 3.4% PCE is unwinding the debasement trade (gold/BTC down, USD up) and rotating equity money from Mag7 into AI chipmakers; next FOMC is a binary hold-or-hike overhang.
